name: apex_session_delta_tracker
mechanism: 在 SQLite 会话表中增加 APEX ΔG 字段：delta_g_before/after/gain_ratio/harm_rate/resource_usage，支持会话级增益追踪和古法看板

apex_mapping.Pan: ΔG 可视化 → 看板不再失真
apex_mapping.Soul: 会话意识：每个会话有 delta_g 标识

measurable_gates.record_session_apex: 写入 5个新字段到 sessions 表
measurable_gates.session_delta_g_query: SELECT delta_g_after, gain_ratio FROM sessions WHERE session_id=?

author: Hermes × carry
